vector<int> steps(801, -1); 

int compute_steps(int m, int k, vector<int>& steps) {

vector<int> steps(801, -1); 

int compute_steps(int m, int k, vector<int>& steps) {
    if (m == 1) return 1;
    if (steps[m] != -1) return steps[m];
    int next = count_set_bits(m);
    int res = 1 + compute_steps(next, k, steps);
    steps[m] = res;
    return res;
}

vector<int> steps(801, -1);

int compute_steps(int m) {
    if (m == 1) return 1;
    if (steps[m] != -1) return steps[m];
    int next = __builtin_popcount(m);
    int res = 1 + compute_steps(next);
    steps[m] = res;
    return res;
}
